title: CC field in mass email
excerpt:
The mass email option (selecting multiple contacts on Contacts board and then Email option in the popup box at the bottom) is a key addition - currently in Beta mode.

posts.author: jessedi (Jesse)
posts.cookedHtml:
The mass email option (selecting multiple contacts on Contacts board and then Email option in the popup box at the bottom) is a key addition - currently in Beta mode.
But a massive gap is the CC emails in the email being sent out. The value of that is that the CC’d emails can receive replies (to all), not just the sending email.

posts.author: Fabienvlems (Fabien)
posts.cookedHtml: Big pain for us as well, would be great if there’s a cc option.

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @noasegal @Fabienvlems @jessedi

Checkout EasyMails where you can use monday.com board’s column as CC/BCC or you can send single mail for mass email and write select CC/BCC single time for mass email
EasyMails have diff unique features also like create html templetes using drag and drop editor and email analytics report for email open, sent etc.
